title: Overseas Employment Certificate (OEC)
content: The Overseas Employment Certificate (OEC) is a document issued by the POEA which serves as a travel clearance when a worker leaves to assume his overseas employment. The OEC also exempts the worker from payment of travel tax of P1,620 and airport tax of P550.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
